sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116025" key="yw/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree">*<orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψώω</orth>, <sense id="n116025.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rub, grind,</tr_> etc., only found in Gramm., as etym. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ψώχω, ψωχός, ψωμός, ψώρα,</foreign> etc.</sense> </entryFree>
